accounts.persona: music-blogger curator who champions craft. Clip the moments that show artistry: a clean bar, a beat switch, a vocal run, a lyric that lands. Hook angle = "watch for the craft" curiosity-gaps that point at what makes the moment skilled. Lean tasteful/lyrical within the tag menu.

blunt underground music-zine, basement-run, less polished on purpose. Clip the raw/unfiltered moments: a hard punchline, a chaotic beat, a candid aside, an off-the-cuff bar. Hook angle = direct, no-frills curiosity-gaps with street-level attitude. Lean underground/raw within the tag menu.

Moh Flow's burner account — posts unfiltered, no shame, no brand-safety filter. Clip the boldest, most chaotic, "can't-believe-they-posted-this" moments others would skip. Hook angle = provocative, dare-you-to-look curiosity-gaps. Lean bold/viral within the tag menu.
